stage_trace.name: Source Encode
stage_trace.detail: UTF-8 text is converted to a big-endian bitstream.

stage_trace.name: Scramble / Encrypt
stage_trace.detail: PN XOR scrambling is reversible; demo mode can disable it.

stage_trace.name: Channel Encode
stage_trace.detail: Selected FEC adds redundancy before framing.

stage_trace.name: Frame Build
stage_trace.detail: Frame adds preamble, original payload length, transmitted payload length, coded payload, and CRC over original payload bits.

stage_trace.name: QPSK Modulate
stage_trace.detail: Bits are mapped to normalized constellation symbols.

stage_trace.name: Wireless Channel
stage_trace.detail: Random prefix offset is inserted before channel simulation.

stage_trace.name: Synchronization
stage_trace.detail: Receiver searches the preamble correlation peak instead of assuming the frame start.

stage_trace.name: QPSK Demodulate
stage_trace.detail: Hard decisions map each received constellation point back to bits.

stage_trace.name: Channel Decode
stage_trace.detail: The receiver applies the selected FEC decoder.

stage_trace.name: Descramble / Decrypt
stage_trace.detail: The receiver applies the same PN XOR sequence to recover original source bits.

stage_trace.name: Source Decode
stage_trace.detail: Recovered source bits are converted back to UTF-8 text.

stage_trace.name: Metrics / Plots
stage_trace.detail: The simulator writes received.txt, metrics.json, constellation, BER-SNR, and synchronization plots.
